title: craftable horse items
description: you can craft hours armors and els.
body:
### **Craftable horse iteams**

 

This data pack expands Minecraft’s mechanics by allowing players to craft valuable items for their horses. Now you can easily create horse armor and saddles using new crafting recipes.

 

*   **Horse Armor:** Craft different types of horse armor (Iron, Gold, and Diamond) using the corresponding metals and leather. Personalize your horses and give them extra protection.
    
*   **Saddle:** Craft a saddle using leather and some iron. A saddle is essential for riding and controlling horses.
    

**Recipes:**

**Leather Horse Armor**

 

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_39d3d8d1-28a2-4c58-af2b-78cc57f4fe80.png)**

**\---------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Iron Horse Armor:**

 

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_30e8add2-d696-4025-a851-b70c74fe6353.png)

**\---------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Gold Horse Armor:**

 

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c36775dc-cd4f-4186-9dc6-f7e27730bd89.png)

**\---------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Diamond Horse Armor:**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_265a1d07-bbcd-4aec-a417-747c07ef2e63.png)

**\---------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Saddle:**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e54ec8e2-97f1-494f-ab67-0f07f6311ac3.png)

**\---------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Usage:**

1.  Install this data pack into your Minecraft world’s “data packs” folder.
2.  Open a crafting table and use the recipes above to craft horse armor and a saddle.
3.  Equip your new items to your horse and enjoy!

This data pack enhances the Minecraft experience by providing more options to care for your horse and make it a reliable companion in battles or adventures.

**Instructions:**

*   Install the data pack into your world’s “data packs” folder.
*   Start the game and use the /reload command to load the data pack.
